text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This summer camp, we're focused on devising a
special strategy to tackle the coming autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So, like, what's the plan for camp?
choice_data_list:
I was thinking we'd work on maxing out your
speed.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? My speed? What about the pool?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait... they're not gonna have a pool here when
the ocean's right there, huh? Guess that's out the
window.
choice_data_list: Also, I've arranged a special instructor for you.
Also, I've arranged a special instructor for you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What instructor?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Goooood morning! Time for early-day training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Sakura Bakushin O. She's making a name
for herself as a sprinter.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh, no. It's, like, four a.m.—that's way too early. Even my trainer's half asleep.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, am I seriously gonna have to get up this
early the whole camp? Like every single day?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan is aiming to be faster than anyone
at this year's autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So I want to focus primarily on speed training. Of
course, sprints and medium races put different
demands on the body, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Speed isn't built in a day! If you truly want to push
your legs to the limit, early action is key!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's gooo! Bakushin! Bakushiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Zooooom!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: She's so fast...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Given our current situation, Sakura Bakushin O's
speed seems like exactly what we need
nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Whatever!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: B-Bakushin, Bakushiiiiin...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I can't HEAAAR YOUUU! Bakushin, Bakushiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oho! You've got some nice Bakushin in that voice!
What about you, Jordan?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIN! BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... Jordan... Wait uuup...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What are you so tired for? We're only just getting
started!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: All that shouting... takes a lot... out of me...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pfff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our early-bird life—or rather, summer
camp—has begun.
